title: Flea Treatment in Flushing, Queens | $350–$650 | Best Pest Control NYC

intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Flushing home? Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Flushing, Queens, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and protect your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Flushing residents for years with reliable, effective flea extermination services. We understand the unique challenges of multi-family buildings and dense residential areas in Flushing, offering flexible scheduling, bilingual service, and treatment plans tailored to your specific situation.
localContext: From the bustling apartments near Main Street and the shops of downtown Flushing to the residential homes around Kissena Park and Bowne Park, flea infestations can occur anywhere pets are present. The area's mix of high-rise buildings, garden apartments, and single-family homes requires customized treatment approaches that our Flushing-based team expertly provides.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Flushing?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Flushing range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment and the extent of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any treatment begins.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because fleas have multiple life stages, we typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 2-3 weeks to eliminate any newly hatched fleas and ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We'll provide specific instructions on when it's safe to re-enter treated areas, typically after 2-4 hours once surfaces have dried. Your family's safety is our top priority.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Flushing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Flushing, Queens, subject to availability. We understand how quickly flea problems can escalate, especially in multi-unit buildings, and strive to respond to your needs as quickly as possible.
